raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The PREP Fellowship Program provides teens new tools to better prepare for their next chapter in life.",
    "Jews represent approximately 3% of the California population but 62.4% of religious-based hate crimes in the state in 2022 were perpetrated against the Jewish community.",
    "Antisemitic attacks have increased to historic levels in the last six months since the October 7th attacks.",
    "The PREP Fellowship Program helps local students develop resiliency, which is a crucial skill for all young people.",
    "Antisemitic incidents have dramatically increased on college campuses and in society.",
    "Participants in the PREP Fellowship Program are learning how to communicate effectively and recognize bias.",
    "The PREP Fellowship Program focuses on three competencies: having difficult conversations about antisemitism, standing up for important issues, and recognizing mental health issues in peers.",
    "The PREP Fellowship is designed to help high school juniors and seniors acquire practical tools for their transition to college, the workforce, or a gap year.",
    "Participants engage in ten workshops and one spring retreat during the seven-month PREP Fellowship Program."
  ]
}
```
